Home / Services / AC Installation

AC Installation

Professional AC installation for efficient cooling in your El Paso home.

Installing a new AC system is a significant investment, and it's crucial to choose the right equipment and a qualified installer. Alamo HVAC provides expert AC installation services tailored to the unique needs of El Paso homes. We'll help you select the perfect system for your home's size, layout, and energy efficiency goals.

We work with all major brands and models, and our technicians are trained to install systems correctly and efficiently. We'll handle everything from removing your old unit to connecting the new system and ensuring proper operation. We also offer ductwork inspection and repair services to maximize the performance of your new AC.

Whether you're upgrading to a more energy-efficient model or installing AC in a new construction home, Alamo HVAC is your trusted partner. We're committed to providing exceptional service and ensuring your complete satisfaction. Enjoy a cool and comfortable home all summer long with a new AC system installed by Alamo HVAC.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Consultation - We assess your needs and recommend the best AC system for your home.
  2. 02 Step 2: System Selection - We help you choose the right size and type of AC unit.
  3. 03 Step 3: Professional Installation - Our certified technicians install your new AC system.
  4. 04 Step 4: System Testing and Training - We ensure proper operation and provide instructions.

Benefits

  • Expert system selection
  • Professional installation
  • Improved energy efficiency
  • Increased home comfort

Frequently Asked Questions

How do I choose the right size AC unit for my home?

Our experienced technicians will perform a load calculation to determine the optimal size AC unit for your home based on factors like square footage, insulation, and window placement. This ensures efficient cooling without wasting energy.

Do you offer financing options for AC installation?

Yes, we offer flexible financing options to make AC installation more affordable. Contact us to learn more about our financing plans.

How long does AC installation typically take?

The installation process usually takes one to two days, depending on the complexity of the job. We'll provide a more accurate timeline during the consultation.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with ac installation? Contact us today.
